The Future of Infrastructure

Navigating the complexities of Germany's power grid.

Revolt is the technical anchor for energy investors, providing the data and strategic engagement necessary for successful grid connection in Germany’s evolving regulatory landscape.

Our Legacy

Decade of Strategic Expertise

With over ten years on the front lines of European energy infrastructure, Revolt has witnessed every major shift in the German energy transition. We don't just observe the market; we actively shape the technical frameworks that define it.

10+
Years Experience
500+
MW Connected

Core Competency

Leading the BESS Revolution

Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) are the backbone of grid stability. Revolt specializes in the high-stakes engineering and negotiation required to bring large-scale infrastructure projects from planning to activation.

  • Technical Feasibility Assessments
  • BNetzA Regulatory Alignment
  • System Integration Strategies

Regulatory Navigation

TSO & DSO Engagement

The German grid is a complex web of Transmission and Distribution System Operators. Revolt acts as your primary liaison, ensuring technical compliance with BNetzA standards while accelerating the connection timeline through established relationships.

Precision-engineered grid strategies for the modern age.

BNetzA Compliance

Direct alignment with the Federal Network Agency for seamless project approval.

TSO Engagement

High-level negotiation and technical integration with TenneT, 50Hertz, Amprion, and TransnetBW.

Infrastructure Audit

Deep-dive technical due diligence for existing and planned grid assets.

Ready to secure your grid connection?

Discuss your project with our engineering team to secure your position in the German energy transition.

SCHEDULE TECHNICAL REVIEW
Revolt

Navigating grid access risks for BESS, renewables, and data centres through expert strategy and execution.
